# Admin HTTP contract baseline — generated by `just test-contract`.
# One line per mounted route: the status each principal receives.
# Regenerate with UPDATE_CONTRACT_BASELINE=1 and review every change.
DELETE /admin/devices/certs/{id}                             anonymous=307 non-admin=303 admin=404
DELETE /admin/devices/pats/{id}                              anonymous=307 non-admin=303 admin=404
